landing-access: Access your account to book appointments and track your past visits.
landing-check-in-to: Check in to your appointment or view your current queue status.
landing-no-account: No account needed. Get help immediately and check queue status.
landing-schedule: Schedule an appointment with a department.
reference-check: Check your queue details OR check in for an appointment
reference-use: Use one of the following methods to see more details
reference-click: Click to use the camera to scan the QR code:
access-you: You don't have permission to access this page.
auth-sign: Sign in to your account or create a new one to access appointments and track your past visits.
userdash-if: If you need to leave the building, we can send you updates as your turn approaches.
userdash-stepout: You've stepped out. We've notified staff and you'll receive updates about your estimated waiting time.
userdash-wait: Wait times are estimated and may vary. Urgent cases may be prioritised and seen before you.
userdash-we: We appreciate your patience and understanding.
